A

addUser(String, String, String) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.UserDataStore
Adds a new user to the user manager and the user list, then saves the updated data to the file.
addUser(String, String, String) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.UserManager
Adds a new user to the list.
alias() - Method in record class com.example.formfiller.UserManager.User
Returns the value of the alias record component.

C

com.example.formfiller - module com.example.formfiller
 
com.example.formfiller - package com.example.formfiller
 
createFullToggle(ToggleButton, ToggleGroup, ToggleButton, String, String) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.FormUtils
Creates a toggle button group with two buttons and a StringProperty to track the selected toggle.

D

dateConverter(DatePicker) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.FormUtils
Sets a custom date format for the DatePicker(non american format).

E

equals(Object) - Method in record class com.example.formfiller.UserManager.User
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

F

FormFillerApplication - Class in com.example.formfiller
The FormFillerApplication class is the main entry point for the JavaFX application.
FormFillerApplication() - Constructor for class com.example.formfiller.FormFillerApplication
 
FormUtils - Class in com.example.formfiller
FormUtils provides utility methods for handling form-related operations, such as updating capacity options based on selected iPhone model, converting date formats, creating toggle buttons with string properties, and validating various input formats like IBAN, IMEI, and email.
FormUtils() - Constructor for class com.example.formfiller.FormUtils
 

G

getAppDir() - Static method in class com.example.formfiller.ParsingUtils
Retrieves the application directory path, which is useful for locating resources like Tesseract data files.
getStage() - Method in class com.example.formfiller.PreferencesWindow
 
getUserCredentials() - Method in class com.example.formfiller.UserDataStore
Returns an observable list of user credentials.

H

hashCode() - Method in record class com.example.formfiller.UserManager.User
Returns a hash code value for this object.

I

isValidEmail(String) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.FormUtils
Validates the given email string with a regex.
isValidIban(String) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.FormUtils
Validates the given IBAN string with a regex.
isValidImei(String) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.FormUtils
Validates the given IMEI string with a regex.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.example.formfiller.FormFillerApplication
The main entry point of the application.

P

ParsingUtils - Class in com.example.formfiller
ParsingUtils provides utility methods for parsing and extracting data from images using OCR, and filling form fields with the extracted data.
ParsingUtils() - Constructor for class com.example.formfiller.ParsingUtils
 
password() - Method in record class com.example.formfiller.UserManager.User
Returns the value of the password record component.
performOCR(File, Map<String, TextField>) - Static method in class com.example.formfiller.ParsingUtils
Performs Optical Character Recognition (OCR) on the provided image file using Tesseract, and fills the specified form fields with the extracted data.
PreferencesWindow - Class in com.example.formfiller
 
PreferencesWindow(UserDataStore) - Constructor for class com.example.formfiller.PreferencesWindow
 

R

removeUser(UserManager.User) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.UserDataStore
Removes a user from the user manager and the user list, then saves the updated data to the file.

S

show() - Method in class com.example.formfiller.PreferencesWindow
 
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.FormFillerApplication
The start method is called after the application has been launched.
Start(String, String, Map<String, String>) - Static method in class com.example.formfiller.WebScript
Starts the web automation process by initializing the Safari WebDriver, navigating to the login page, filling in the credentials, and proceeding through the form.

T

toString() - Method in record class com.example.formfiller.UserManager.User
Returns a string representation of this record class.

U

updateCapacityOptions(ComboBox<String>, ComboBox<String>) - Method in class com.example.formfiller.FormUtils
Updates the capacity options in the given ComboBox based on the selected iPhone model.
User(String, String, String) - Constructor for record class com.example.formfiller.UserManager.User
Creates an instance of a User record class.
UserDataStore - Class in com.example.formfiller
UserDataStore is responsible for managing user credentials.
UserDataStore() - Constructor for class com.example.formfiller.UserDataStore
Constructor initializes the UserDataStore, creates necessary directories and files, and loads existing user data from the file.
UserManager - Class in com.example.formfiller
UserManager class to manage user data.
UserManager() - Constructor for class com.example.formfiller.UserManager
 
UserManager.User - Record Class in com.example.formfiller
User class representing a user with an alias, username, and password.
username() - Method in record class com.example.formfiller.UserManager.User
Returns the value of the username record component.

W

WebScript - Class in com.example.formfiller
WebScript is a class that automates the process of filling out a web form using Selenium WebDriver.
WebScript() - Constructor for class com.example.formfiller.WebScript
